name: Scriptable Block
description: Adds a programmable block to the level editor with a custom scripting DSL. Write code to control objects, player, camera, and colors with 4 trigger modes.

max-script-length.name: Max Script Length
max-script-length.description: Maximum characters allowed per script block.

execution-time-limit-ms.name: Execution Time Limit (ms)
execution-time-limit-ms.description: Max milliseconds a single script can run per frame.

max-instructions-per-frame.name: Max Instructions Per Frame
max-instructions-per-frame.description: Maximum interpreter instructions per frame per script.
